channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: California delays release of Baby2Baby diaper contract amid public records debate
item.description: The Newsom administration took 24 days to decide whether to release the multi-million-dollar contract with nonprofit Baby2Baby to the public.

item.title: U.S. voices concern over China's nuclear expansion following missile test
item.description: China conducted a test launch of a long-range ballistic missile from a nuclear submarine in the South Pacific, prompting international criticism.

item.title: Telegram used to share rape videos and drugging tips, prosecutors say
item.description: The suspects posted videos of their attacks and referred to women as "cars," sedatives as "fuel" and rape as "driving," according to court documents.

item.title: Trump says ceasefire with Iran over, calls negotiations "waste of time"
item.description: Oil prices shot up 5% after President Trump said negotiations with Iran were over, and called it "a waste of time dealing with them."
